ntfy_sos_proof_status.adb_path_status: disabled and not final SOS path

scheduler_readiness_reason: A candidate scheduled task, trigger, action, working directory, and rollback command are observable in the existing scheduler proposal, but Anthony has not approved scheduler registration and runtime launch/execution plus queue mutation remain blocked.

candidate_scheduler_target.purpose: Start one gated AI_OS relay/night cycle without manual launch.

proposed_manual_registration_step_not_au.ui_fallback: Use Windows Task Scheduler to create a daily 02:00 task named AIOS_Relay_Nightly that runs the same pwsh action from C:\Dev\Ai.Os only after Anthony separately approves the exact registration.

pre_registration_validation_commands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$errors = $null; [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize((Get-Content -Raw automation/orchestration/Invoke-AiOsNightCycle.ps1), [ref]$errors) | Out-Null; if ($errors) { $errors; exit 1 } else { 'PARSE_OK' }"
risk_notes: The candidate action includes -Apply and would start a future gated night cycle when the schedule fires; this is why scheduler registration needs separate explicit approval and must not be inferred from this review.
The ntfy proof is notification-only and does not create a command channel.
The prior scheduler preview remains blocked for actual registration until human approval and validation evidence are present.
next_safe_action: Review the proposed apply-request packet and, only if Anthony approves, run a separate scheduler registration APPLY lane that names the exact task, trigger, action, working directory, log path, rollback command, and validation chain.
no_protected_action_statement: No scheduler registration, Task Scheduler mutation, runtime launch, runtime execution, queue mutation, SOS send, broker action, live trading, credential access, deletion, push to main, merge, or PR closure was performed.
